content: Self-Refine’s single-perspective iterative refinement framework can be enhanced by integrating multiple inconsistent solution perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-reflection system that retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of no extra training or supervision while boosting output quality. This hybrid framework lets an LLM first generate diverse conflicting drafts across different perspectives, then iteratively refine them with self-feedback without relying on external data or labels.
